# eCert Platform

## Project Overview

Digital certification platform for TMPSA/สพฉ (Thai medical/EMS certification bodies). Issues digital certificates with expiration, approval workflows, QR verification, training management, and event/organizer integration.

**Stack**: Vite + React 18 + TypeScript + shadcn/ui + Tailwind CSS + React Router  
**Generated by**: Lovable (AI app builder) — frontend only, no backend yet  
**Language**: Thai-first with English switchable via react-i18next

## Git Workflow

- **Repo**: https://github.com/Agentic-Korn/ecert-platform (public)
- **`main`** branch: Lovable pushes design/UI changes here (protected — requires PR + 1 approval)
- **`dev`** branch: Claude Code works here for logic, data model, wiring
- **Never push directly to `main`** — always create PR from `dev`
- Before starting work: `git pull origin main` into `dev` to sync Lovable's latest changes

## Key Decisions

- **Tenancy**: Single-tenant for TMPSA/สพฉ now, but include `org_id` in data models for future multi-org
- **Communication**: Email only for MVP — LINE integration deferred
- **Cert issuance**: Support both direct issuance (by approver) AND training-triggered issuance
- **Frontend/Backend split**: Lovable owns design only (hosting/deploy). Claude Code owns ALL logic, wiring, state, i18n
- **State**: In-memory mock data (React Context + useReducer). Supabase deferred to later phase
- **i18n**: All UI text uses `t('key')` from react-i18next — never hardcode text strings

## Architecture

### State Management (`src/lib/store.tsx`)
- React Context + useReducer — architectural center of the app
- `AppState` holds: programs, certificates, approvals, courses, enrollments, users, currentUser, verifyLogs, auditLog
- 11 action types: LOGIN, LOGOUT, ISSUE_CERT, APPROVE_REQUEST, REJECT_REQUEST, SUBMIT_RENEWAL, ENROLL_STUDENT, MARK_ATTENDANCE, COMPLETE_COURSE, LOG_VERIFY, SET_LANGUAGE
- Initial state seeded from `mockData.ts` arrays
- Every significant action appends to `auditLog`
- **Note**: File is `.tsx` (not `.ts`) because it contains JSX for the Provider component

### i18n (`src/lib/i18n.ts` + `src/locales/`)
- Thai (`th.json`) is default language, English (`en.json`) is fallback
- ~300 translation keys organized by namespace: common, app, nav, auth, roles, dashboard, programs, certificates, approvals, training, events, messages, templates, users, apiClients, auditLogs, settings, portal, verify, notFound, language
- Supports interpolation: `{{count}}`, `{{holder}}`, `{{name}}`, `{{step}}`, `{{total}}`, `{{certNo}}`

### Auth & Route Guards
- `src/pages/LoginPage.tsx` — Mock auth with dropdown of 4 users (admin, approver, trainer, holder)
- `src/components/RouteGuard.tsx` — Role-based route protection, redirects to `/login` if unauthorized
- Admin routes require: admin, approver, or trainer roles
- Portal route requires: holder role
- Public routes (no auth): `/login`, `/verify`, `/verify/:certNo`

### Routes (src/pages/)
- `/login` — Login Page (public)
- `/` — Dashboard (admin)
- `/programs` — Certification Programs (admin)
- `/certificates` — Certificates: issue, extend, revoke (admin)
- `/approvals` — Approval Inbox (admin)
- `/reports` — Reports Dashboard with charts (admin)
- `/training` — Training Courses with enrollment/attendance (admin)
- `/events` — Events + Discount Rules (admin)
- `/messages` — Message Analytics (admin)
- `/templates` — Badge + Message Templates (admin)
- `/users` — Users & Roles (admin)
- `/api-clients` — API Clients & Keys (admin)
- `/logs` — Audit Logs (admin)
- `/settings` — Settings (admin)
- `/portal` — Holder Portal (holder role, no sidebar)
- `/verify` `/verify/:certNo` — Public Verify Page (public, no sidebar)

### Key Files
- `src/App.tsx` — Router config, AppProvider wrapping, i18n import
- `src/lib/types.ts` — All TypeScript interfaces (Certificate, ApprovalRequest, Program, Course, etc.)
- `src/lib/store.tsx` — Centralized state (Context + useReducer)
- `src/lib/i18n.ts` — react-i18next configuration
- `src/lib/mockData.ts` — Seed data for initial state
- `src/locales/th.json` / `src/locales/en.json` — Translation files
- `src/components/AppSidebar.tsx` — Admin sidebar navigation
- `src/components/RouteGuard.tsx` — Auth route guards
- `src/components/QRCodeDisplay.tsx` — Real QR code component (qrcode.react)
- `src/components/StatusBadge.tsx` — Status badge component

### 3 Core User Journeys (all wired end-to-end)

**Journey A — Issue → Approve → Verify**
1. Admin issues cert via Certificates page form → creates pending cert + approval request
2. Approver approves in Approvals page → generates real cert number, sets cert active with dates
3. Anyone verifies at `/verify/{certNo}` → shows cert details with masked holder name

**Journey B — Training → Enrollment → Certs**
1. Admin opens course in Training page → enrolls students, marks attendance
2. "Complete Course" creates bulk approval requests for attended students
3. Approver approves → active certificates created

**Journey C — Holder Portal**
1. Holder logs in → sees their certificates with QR codes
2. Requests renewal → creates approval request
3. Approver approves → cert expiry extended

### Files Lovable Must NOT Modify
If Lovable later makes UI tweaks, it must NOT modify:
- `src/lib/store.tsx`, `src/lib/types.ts`, `src/lib/i18n.ts`
- `src/locales/*`
- `src/components/RouteGuard.tsx`, `src/components/QRCodeDisplay.tsx`

## npm Install Note

npm 11.x on Windows has a postinstall bug. Use:
```bash
npm install --ignore-scripts
node node_modules/esbuild/install.js
node node_modules/vite/node_modules/esbuild/install.js
node node_modules/@swc/core/postinstall.js
```
